name: Bambu Lab X2D 0.4 nozzle template time_lapse_gcode
time_lapse_gcode:
;======== X2D timelapse gcode ========
;======== 2026/02/13 ========
; SKIPPABLE_START
; SKIPTYPE: timelapse
M622.1 S1 ; for prev firware, default turned on

M1002 judge_flag timelapse_record_flag

M622 J1

{if timelapse_type == 0} ; traditional timelapse (no wipe tower)
{if !spiral_mode && !(has_timelapse_safe_pos && print_sequence != "by object") }
    {if most_used_physical_extruder_id!= curr_physical_extruder_id}
        M83
        G1 Z{max_layer_z + 0.4} F1200
        M400
    {endif}
{endif}

{if has_timelapse_safe_pos && print_sequence != "by object"}
M9711 M{timelapse_type} E{most_used_physical_extruder_id} X{timelapse_pos_x} Y{timelapse_pos_y} Z{layer_z} S11 C10 O0 T3000
{else}
M9711 M{timelapse_type} E{most_used_physical_extruder_id} Z{layer_z} S11 C10 O0 T3000
{endif}

{if !spiral_mode && !(has_timelapse_safe_pos && print_sequence != "by object") }
    {if most_used_physical_extruder_id!= curr_physical_extruder_id}
        G90
        M83
        G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200
        G0 F18000
    {endif}
{endif}

{elsif timelapse_type == 1} ; smooth timelapse
G150.3 ; move to garbage can
M400
M1004 S5 P1  ; external shutter
M400 P300
M971 S11 C10 O0
M400 P350

G90
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200
G0 Y210 F18000
{endif}

M623
; SKIPPABLE_END
